title: Glassnode Expands to Include Macro and Traditional Finance Data
summary: Glassnode is adding macroeconomic and traditional finance (TradFi) data to its platform, helping users understand digital asset markets in a broader financial context. This move aims to provide a more comprehensive view of market conditions for crypto investors.
body:
Glassnode, a leading blockchain data provider, has announced it will expand its data coverage to include macroeconomic and traditional finance (TradFi) metrics. This addition will allow users to better contextualize digital asset markets within the broader financial landscape, offering a more holistic view of market conditions.

The new data will include key macroeconomic indicators such as interest rates, inflation data, and economic growth metrics. Additionally, Glassnode will provide insights into traditional financial markets, including stock market performance and commodity prices. This expansion is designed to help investors make more informed decisions by understanding the interplay between digital assets and traditional financial markets.

For everyday crypto users, this means having access to a more comprehensive set of tools to analyze market trends. By integrating macro and TradFi data, Glassnode aims to provide a clearer picture of how external financial conditions might impact digital asset prices. This can be particularly useful for investors looking to diversify their portfolios or hedge against market volatility.

Glassnode plans to roll out these new data features gradually, starting with the most relevant macroeconomic indicators. Users can expect to see these additions in the coming months, with further updates and enhancements based on user feedback. This expansion underscores Glassnode's commitment to providing a robust and comprehensive data platform for the crypto community.
twitterThread: Glassnode is adding macroeconomic and TradFi data to its platform, giving users a bigger picture of digital asset markets.
This means you'll see key metrics like interest rates, inflation, and stock market performance alongside blockchain data. A game-changer for informed investing.

Keep an eye on Glassnode's updates for these new features. More context means smarter crypto decisions. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-13-glassnode-expands-to-include-macro-and-traditional-finance-data
